case_title: SAI CHEN LIU VS. CAITLANL YONS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED FEB-07-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GALARZA, BENJAMIN
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIU, SAI CHEN AS TO DEFENDANT YONS, CAITLANL AKA CAITLAN LYONS GALARZA, BENJAMIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, SAI CHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GALARZA, BENJAMIN CLAIMS AGAINST CAITLAN YONS WERE ADJUDICATED IN CASE #CSM-17-856997 ON FEB. 13, 2018; NO EVIDENCE PRESENTED ON CLAIMS AGAINST BENJAMIN GALARZA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT OF CLAIM TO INCLUDE NEW DEFENDANT, BENJAMIN GALARZA FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, SAI CHEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF SAI CHEN LIU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED MANDARIN COURT INTERPRETER AIDONG NI #301135. DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. ALLEGATIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT CAITLANL YONS ARE "RES JUDICATA" SEE CASE #856997. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIU, SAI CHEN AS TO DEFENDANT YONS, CAITLANL AKA CAITLAN LYONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
